subject: refactor(ui): replace spinners, button groups, nav, and menu with DaisyUI
body:
Second pass of DaisyUI component migration — replaces remaining custom
patterns for consistency and reduced hand-rolled code.

- 3 loading spinners → DaisyUI loading loading-spinner (SampleImages, App.jsx)
- ExportButtons format selector → join (connected button group)
- ThemeSelector → join (mode toggle + combo picker)
- AIPromptHelper options → btn btn-xs + join (purpose, orientation, colors)
- BurgerMenu list → menu menu-sm (DaisyUI item styling, keeps disclosure pattern)
- MobileNav → dock dock-sm (native safe area, dock-active, dock-label)

Tags: ui, daisyui, components, dock, menu, join, loading, spinner
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: minor
